events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the absence of any curing blankets or compound on the finished concrete indicates a failure to comply with ACI 308 curing requirements, risking plastic shrinkage cracking, crazing, dusting, scaling, and reduced durability — flagged as `fail` with `high` risk and degraded/non-compliant condition, with recommended remedial curing or sealer application depending on elapsed time since placement.
